assignments.name: Put_New_MACD_LI_to_Collection_Dispose
assignments.label: Put New MACD LI to Collection - Dispose

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opportunity_to_Exclude_from_MACD_creation
recordUpdates.label: Update Opportunity to Exclude from MACD creation

fields.name: Service_Termination_Notice_Date
fields.helpText: This is the date in which the customer served their termination notice for the selected devices

validationRule.errorMessage: Collection Date must be greater than today

fields.name: Asset_Dispose_Text_0
fields.fieldText: Choose an asset/assets you want to dispose:

fields.name: newDisposalText
fields.fieldText: Would you like to dispose of another asset(s)?

fields.name: Parent_Asset_Text
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity's account does not have any parent assets related to it.


Click "Exit" to exit the process.

fields.name: Would_you_like_to_update_current_disposals_or_add_a_new_disposal
fields.fieldText: Would you like to update current disposals or add a new disposal?

variables.description: Display parent assets of a selected account
variables.name: assetsToUpdate
